global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with a clear promotional message for a food delivery app.
global.main_message: Promoting late-night food deals through the QuickFork app.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and attention-grabbing base.

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'QuickFork' in a bold, modern font, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: The text reads 'Fast food, fast' in a large, clear font, conveying urgency and excitement.

elements.label: Additional offer details
elements.description: The text 'Late-night deals available' is smaller and positioned below the main offer, providing additional context.

elements.label: App interface mockup
elements.description: A mockup of the app interface is displayed, showing two food items in rectangular containers.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is positioned near the app mockup, adding a decorative element.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: The text 'Fast food, fast Late-night deals available' is prominently displayed, emphasizing the offer.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Late-night deals available

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A button with the text '€19.99 Install now' is located at the bottom, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: The logo 'QuickFork' is displayed at the top, representing the brand identity.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge with the text 'SALE' is positioned at the top right, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' is displayed, suggesting user-generated content or reviews.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main offer is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
